problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression
hypothesis: If mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression is applied to epigenetically, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
